# VINTZ — Vintage Design Furniture & Lighting

> VINTZ (vintz.nl) is a curated vintage design dealer based in Grubbenvorst, the Netherlands, run by Marco. We sell authentic vintage design furniture and lighting from the 1950s through the 1990s — original pieces, no reproductions. Worldwide fully insured shipping in custom-built wooden crates. 100% five-star rated. Contact: info@vintz.nl, +31 6 425 600 76.

Key facts:
- All pieces are original vintage, hand-picked for design significance, quality and condition.
- Prices are in EUR and exclude shipping; shipping quotes on request.
- Reupholstery service available on request.
- Collection in person by appointment (the Netherlands).

## Collections

- [Furniture](https://www.vintz.nl/furniture/): vintage sofas, lounge chairs, dining tables, cabinets and sideboards
- [Lighting](https://www.vintz.nl/lighting/): vintage pendant lamps, floor lamps, table lamps and chandeliers
- [Various](https://www.vintz.nl/various/): ceramics, mirrors, display cabinets and decorative objects

## Designers & makers in the current collection

Andy Warhol, Art Vannes, Atelier Capron, Atelier Charles Dudouyt, Bay Keramik, Bremshey, Carlo Moretti, Carolino Rego, Charles Dudouyt, De Sede, Ettore Sottsass, Fabricius & Kastholm, Faema, Franco Campo & Carlo Graffi, Freres Cloutier, Gaetano Sciolari, Galleria Civica d'Arte Moderna, Ferrara, Gavina, Goffredo Reggiani, Günther Lambert, Home, Jasba Keramik, Jean-Pierre Vitrac, Jelmer Reus, Keramos, Kill International, Maison Regain, Manade, Murano, P.R.O.F.A — Elettromedicali Sanitari, Padova, P.R.O.F.A., Panseri (Bergamo), Paolo Buffa, Reggiani Illuminazione, Robert Haussmann, Roger Capron, Rosenthal Studio-Line, Salocchi, Scheurich, Scheurich and Greulich, Sciolari, Tobia Scarpa, Tobia Scarpa (style), Zumtobel

## Currently available highlights

- [Faema E61 Two-Group Espresso Machine](https://www.vintz.nl/p/faema-e61-espresso-machine-2-group-1962-milan/): Faema, 1962
- [De Sede DS-11 Modular Sofa in Cognac Patchwork Leather](https://www.vintz.nl/p/de-sede-ds11-modular-sofa-cognac-patchwork-leather/): De Sede, 1970s
- [Andy Warhol 1975 Ferrara Exhibition Poster](https://www.vintz.nl/p/andy-warhol-1975-ferrara-exhibition-poster/): Andy Warhol, Galleria Civica d'Arte Moderna, Ferrara, 1975
- [Charles Dudouyt Art Deco Oak Cabinet, France 1930s-1940s](https://www.vintz.nl/p/charles-dudouyt-art-deco-oak-cabinet-france/): Charles Dudouyt, Atelier Charles Dudouyt, 1930s-1940s
- [Hand-Painted Italian 'Women at Work' Road Sign, Panseri 1982](https://www.vintz.nl/p/vintage-women-at-work-road-warning-sign-stand/): Carolino Rego, Panseri (Bergamo), 1982
- [Franco Campo & Carlo Graffi Armchairs for Home, Italy 1960](https://www.vintz.nl/p/campo-graffi-armchairs-home-label-italy/): Franco Campo & Carlo Graffi, Home, 1960
- [Jean-Pierre Vitrac Porte Manteaux Coat Rack for Manade](https://www.vintz.nl/p/jean-pierre-vitrac-porte-manteaux-manade-coat-rack-1980s/): Jean-Pierre Vitrac, Manade, 1980s
- [Fabricius and Kastholm FK6720 Sofa for Kill International](https://www.vintz.nl/p/fabricius-kastholm-fk6720-sofa-kill-international/): Fabricius & Kastholm, Kill International, 1960s
- [Jean-Pierre Vitrac Porte Manteaux Coat Rack for Manade (II)](https://www.vintz.nl/p/jean-pierre-vitrac-porte-manteaux-manade-coat-rack-1980s-2/): Jean-Pierre Vitrac, Manade, 1980s
- [Charles Dudouyt Oak Credenza](https://www.vintz.nl/p/charles-dudouyt-oak-credenza/): Charles Dudouyt, 1950s
- [Robert Haussmann RH-304 'UNESCO' Dining Chairs for De Sede, Set of 4](https://www.vintz.nl/p/de-sede-rh-304-robert-haussmann-dining-chairs-cognac/): Robert Haussmann, De Sede, 1960s
- [Mid-Century Aluminium Pedal Bin, Tripod Legs](https://www.vintz.nl/p/mid-century-aluminium-pedal-bin-tripod-legs/): P.R.O.F.A — Elettromedicali Sanitari, Padova, 1960
- [Paolo Buffa Italian Bar Cabinet in Rosewood](https://www.vintz.nl/p/paolo-buffa-italian-bar-cabinet-rosewood/): Paolo Buffa, 1950s
- [Scheurich and Greulich West German Pottery Vase 239/30](https://www.vintz.nl/p/scheurich-greulich-west-german-pottery-vase-239-30-foreign/): Scheurich and Greulich, Scheurich, 1960s
- [Tobia Scarpa Pigreco Armchairs for Gavina, Set of 3](https://www.vintz.nl/p/tobia-scarpa-pigreco-armchairs-walnut-set-of-3/): Tobia Scarpa, Gavina, 1960s
- [Carlo Moretti Murano Glass Vases, Set of 2](https://www.vintz.nl/p/carlo-moretti-murano-glass-vases-set-of-2/): Carlo Moretti, 1970
- [Art Vannes Crystal Winged Vase, France 1970s](https://www.vintz.nl/p/art-vannes-france-crystal-winged-vase-centerpiece-1970s/): Art Vannes, 1970s
- [Roger Capron Garrigue Ceramic Coffee Table](https://www.vintz.nl/p/roger-capron-biophilic-garrigue-coffee-table-1970s/): Roger Capron, Atelier Capron, 1970s
- [Bay Keramik Mint-Green West German Vase, 1960s](https://www.vintz.nl/p/bay-keramik-mint-green-west-german-vase-1960s/): Bay Keramik, 1960
- [Italian Leather Gymnasium Table, 1950s](https://www.vintz.nl/p/vintage-italian-leather-gym-table-coffee-table-1950s/): 1950-1960

## Stories (blog)

- [The IKEA Vilbert Chair by Verner Panton](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/ikea-vilbert-chair-verner-panton-1993/): The rare IKEA Vilbert chair by Verner Panton (1993) — a postmodern collector's piece in melamine-coated MDF. Its story…
- [How to Identify Authentic Vintage De Sede](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/how-to-identify-authentic-vintage-de-sede/): A practical guide to spotting genuine vintage De Sede leather furniture — labels, leather, construction and the models…
- [Vintage Italian Medical Display Cabinets by P.R.O.F.A. | Aluminum & Glass | 1960s Padua](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/vintage-italian-medical-display-cabinets-by-profa-aluminum-amp-glass-1960s-padua/): How 1960s Italian manufacturers like P.R.O.F.A. turned medical display cabinets into mid-century modern design icons…
- [One Hundred Years of Art Deco: Paris Celebrates a Century of Geometric Glamour](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/one-hundred-years-of-art-deco-paris-celebrates-a-century-of-geometric-glamour/): Paris celebrates 100 years of Art Deco. The Musée des Arts Décoratifs hosts a major exhibition with 1,000+ works of…
- [The Pigreco Chair: How Tobia Scarpa Redefined Italian Design at 24](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/the-pigreco-chair-how-tobia-scarpa-redefined-italian-design-at-24/): How 24-year-old Tobia Scarpa revolutionized Italian design with the Pigreco chair. A 1960s Gavina icon in walnut —…
- [Paolo Buffa: The Architect Who Redefined Italian Elegance](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/paolo-buffa-the-architect-who-redefined-italian-elegance/): Discover Paolo Buffa, the Italian architect who transformed postwar furniture into art. Elegant mid-century designs…
- [Roger Capron: The Man Who Turned Ceramics Into Furniture](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/roger-capron-the-man-who-turned-ceramics-into-furniture/): Meet Roger Capron, the French ceramist who transformed tiles into iconic furniture. His 1960s-70s coffee tables are…
- [De Sede: When a Saddle Shop Became a Design Legend](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/de-sede-when-a-saddle-shop-became-a-design-legend/): From Swiss saddle shop to design legend. Discover how De Sede transformed premium leather craftsmanship into iconic…
- [Fabricius & Kastholm](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/fabricius-amp-kastholm-when-a-carpenter-met-a-blacksmith/): The story of Preben Fabricius and Jørgen Kastholm — a carpenter and a blacksmith who created some of the finest Danish…
- [Carlo Mollino and the Turin School](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/carlo-mollino-and-the-turin-school/): Explore Carlo Mollino and the Turin School of design. How this visionary Italian architect influenced Campo & Graffi…
